title: Name Tag Crafting Recipe
description: A simple mod/datapack that makes nametags craftable
body:
Craftable Name Tags Datapack and mod
This Minecraft datapack and mod makes Name Tags craftable, allowing you to easily obtain them in game!

Crafting Recipe:

![crafting ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09c643dd14462a49609fd79e7a5c805b5fa6b6a0.png)

How to Install:

Datapack Instructions:

Download the datapack.
Place the .zip file into the datapacks folder of your Minecraft world.
Use /reload in-game or restart your world to enable the datapack.
Mod Instructions:

Download the mod.
Place the .jar file into the mods folder of your Minecraft installation.
]restart your game to enable the mod.
